heading: Payment of pay and allowances of officers of Corps of Engineers from appropriation for improvements
label: 583a Payment of pay and allowances of officers of Corps of Engineers from appropriation for improvements
notes: CodificationSection is derived from the third proviso of , , which was classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 10, Armed Forces, by , .Act June 26, 1936, ch. 83949 Stat. 1974section 181a of Title 10act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 170A Stat. 1

Amendments2022— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, substituted “The personnel described in subsection (b)” for “Regular officers of the Corps of Engineers of the Army, and reserve officers of the Army who are assigned to the Corps of Engineers,”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 117–263

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The personnel described in subsection (b) who are employed primarily on duty connected with non-military public works prosecuted under the direction of the Chief of Engineers, including river and harbor improvements, flood control, and other such works, shall, while so employed, be paid their pay and allowances from the appropriation for the works upon which they are employed.
Regular officers of the Corps of Engineers of the Army.

children.label: B
children.text: Warrant officers (whether regular or reserve component).

children.label: C
children.text: Enlisted members (whether regular or reserve component).
